texto: Here is how to work a jerkbait with Caskings Kestrel BFS. Start by giving your lure short pops, just to give it a walking motion. It should look like this. Next method is all in the reel. Reel fast, then pause to hopefully pick up a reaction strike. How else would you fish a jerkbait? Make sure to follow for more tips.

segmentos.text: Here is how to work a jerkbait with Caskings Kestrel BFS.
Start by giving your lure short pops, just to give it a walking motion.
Next method is all in the reel.
Reel fast, then pause to hopefully pick up a reaction strike.
How else would you fish a jerkbait?
Make sure to follow for more tips.
